description: NBA Live Tracker MCP Server configuration
usage: Add the mcpServers section below to your claude_desktop_config.json or Cursor MCP settings
available_tools: get_live_scoreboard — today's games with live scores
get_player_stats — season stats and game log for any player
get_game_detail — full box score, key moments, win probability
get_predictions — AI win probability predictions by date
get_league_leaders — season leaders by stat category
example_queries: Which NBA games are live right now?
How is LeBron James playing this season?
What is the win probability for the Lakers game tonight?
Who leads the league in assists?
Show me the Eastern Conference standings
